response: The cities of Beitun, Xinjiang, and Wafangdian are all administrative categories within China. Beitun is a county-level city under the direct administration of the regional government, while Wafangdian is one of the two "northern county-level cities" under the administration of Dalian. Xinjiang is a provincial-level autonomous region, and it includes several county-level cities such as Fuhai County, which is where the Project 635 Dam is located. All three cities are administrative divisions within China.
